name: Chile Cheese Cornbread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pan and sauté onions until nicely browned.
2. Turn off the heat and add poppy seeds to the pan.
3. In a bowl, combine dry ingredients, cheese, and chiles.
4. Add beaten egg and milk to the dry mixture and stir until well mixed.
5. Fold in the onions and poppy seeds.
6. Pour batter into 12 muffin papers.
7. Bake at 400 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Additional shredded cheese can be placed on top of the muffins if desired.
